basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Social Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.tiss.edu/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 55 years

content_sections.heading: TISS Social Worker Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Social Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.A. in Social Work/MSW from Central/Deemed/State-Recognised University

content_sections.heading: TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 55 years

content_sections.heading: TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TISS Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TISS Social Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 05 August 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. in Social Work/MSW from a Central/Deemed/State-Recognised University to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Social Worker position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 12,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Social Worker post is between 22 years and 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Social Worker post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Yavatmal, Maharashtra, with the pincode 445001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Social Worker role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Social Worker role is based on a Walk-In-Interview.
